hooks.template: This is why doing (insert action) makes you (insert pain point).
hooks.text: This is why wiring 50K through your bank quietly loses you 600 dollars.

hooks.template: Here's exactly how much (insert action/item) you need to (insert result).
hooks.text: Here's exactly how much a hidden bank rate costs on one 50K China wire.

hooks.template: Yesterday I was at (insert location) when I noticed something (insert adjective).
hooks.text: Three business owners sent the same 50K wire and noticed something strange.

hooks.template: My customer/client got (insert dream result) without (insert pain point).
hooks.text: One business owner's supplier got the full 50K without losing 600 to the bank.

hooks.template: (insert big brand) didn't want to sponsor this video, let me show you what they're missing out on.
hooks.text: Your bank won't tell you this, so here's what they hide on every China wire.
